parsed_review.summary: CP00-839 (RP27 Platform Extensibility — Hermes evidence permission/audit + synthetic fixture bridge, descriptor-only, risk B, 40 units RP27.P08.M04.S16-RP27.P08.M06.S11) is supported by its implementation, tests, local validation evidence, adjudication/inspection placeholders, and no-write/no-real-data boundaries. Verified via Read/Grep/Glob only. (1) Plan, manifest, baseline, contract latest_pack/latest_projection, contract projections.cp839, and registry all agree on 40 units, micro_title distribution {Secondary Workflow Slice:7, Permission And Audit Binding:22, Synthetic Fixture Set:11}, and deliverable distribution {implementation:17, test:2, hermes_evidence:19, claude_review:2}; deviation_from_plan:false. Registry builds rows from HERMES_VALIDATION_ROWS slices (15..22 for M04=7, full 22 for M05, 0..11 for M06=11), which reproduce exactly the planned row titles per micro phase. (2) Descriptor-only / runtime-closed: createRow stamps descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false and every leak flag false, and spreads PLATFORM_EXTENSIBILITY_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (all-false); validators.js rejects any api_key_issued/webhook_delivered/workflow_executed/permission_decision_written/audit_event_written/writes_product_state and enforces no-secret/no-real-data/no-audit-body guards on every row; the descriptor spreads the same attestation. (3) Authority boundary intact: descriptor authority_boundary has claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true, runtime opening deferred to CP00-840; Claude remains a read-only reviewer, not final approver. (4) Hermes control-plane pattern used only for deterministic review packet/receipt: hermes_packet.emits_runtime_receipt:false, command_matrix is validation-command names, fixture_summary states no runtime command execution / permission / audit / extension behavior opened. (5) Claude packet read_only:true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, with invalid_review_blockers present. (6) Closeout handoff routes from CP00-839 to CP00-840 / RP27.P08.M06.S12 with runtime_opening_allowed:false; the case-set Closeout-handoff row override and the descriptor-level handoff both match binding.next_pack_id/next_subphase_id. Contract JSON file agrees: validation.latest_pack_id CP00-839, no_write_attestation all-false; cp838 preserved as historical. Tests bind the registry to the live plan and assert coverage match, runtime-closed descriptor (api_key/webhook/workflow false), projection currency, and CP00-838 historical preservation. The pending-review placeholders (production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, PENDING_REVIEW in adjudication/inspection/claude-review-result, valid_review_receipts:[], invalid_review_attempts:[]) are the correct pre-receipt state; no auth-failure/0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped output is presented as valid evidence (readiness auth preflight passed, exit 0). The production_ready claim under review is the descriptor-verified flag only; runtime_ready stays false and enterprise trust remains human-gated, so the layered claim is sound. Changed-file scope correctly attributes only the 5 platform implementation refs plus the cp00-839 pack artifacts, and does not infer the unrelated dirty UI/workbook files as part of this pack. Transparency: under the read-only constraint I did not independently re-execute the validation commands; I confirmed the implementation is internally consistent with the recorded exit_code 0 command-evidence results. One non-blocking P3 traceability nit in command-evidence.json (hermes_gate.command_ids vs recorded commands mismatch), identical to the accepted CP00-838 P3. No P0/P1/P2 findings. Verdict: PASS; does not block pack closeout or this-CP goal closeout.

findings.title: command-evidence hermes_gate.command_ids do not match the recorded commands
findings.details: hermes_gate.command_ids lists control-plane identifiers (rp00_control_plane_contract_validate, spec_requirement_validate) that do not correspond to the executed commands array, which records only rp27_platform_extensibility_validate (npm run rp27:platform-extensibility:validate) and platform_model_tests (node --test packages/platform/test/*.test.js), both exit_code 0. The evidence file therefore does not self-document which gate commands produced the recorded exit codes. This is purely a traceability/documentation nit in a pack whose subject matter is evidence receipts; it does not affect the descriptor-only, no-write, no-real-data, authority-boundary, or runtime-closed claims, all of which are independently verified in the contract, registry, validators, and tests. It is identical to the accepted non-blocking P3 recorded for CP00-838.
findings.recommendation: Align hermes_gate.command_ids with the commands actually recorded, or add the referenced control-plane/spec-requirements command results, so the evidence file is internally traceable.
findings.post_review_disposition: Noted as non-blocking P3. Does not affect any gate or the production_ready (descriptor-verified) claim; no change required for this pack to close. Recommend tidying in a future evidence-template pass.
